blockingIssues.description: src/hud/index.ts duplicate summary-process prevention uses only a 120s timestamp throttle and does not track/check process liveness, so detached process accumulation can still occur when session-summary runs longer than the window.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure feature metadata references only existing skills (or define missing ones) before mission execution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature metadata for implemented bugfix work references `bugfix-worker`, but no such skill exists in the repo skill set; worker handoff explicitly reported procedural deviation due missing skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission assumptions with repository state for shared artifacts (for example, `.factory/services.yaml` and `.factory/library/`) or mark them optional with fallback behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Scrutiny review noted missing `.factory/services.yaml` and `.factory/library/`, which reduced ability to apply expected shared-state updates.
